_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: Redis
author: aetherix@lunexia.com
description:
Redis in-memory data store egg.

Redis 8.x is the latest stable release.
Used for caching, session storage, pub/sub messaging, and queues.

Default port: 6379.
Persistence data stored in /home/container/data.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# Redis Installation Script
# by Aetherix-ops
#
apt update && apt install -y redis-server

mkdir -p /mnt/server/data

echo "install complete"

variables.name: Redis Password
variables.description: Password for Redis authentication. Leave empty to disable auth.

variables.name: Max Memory (MB)
variables.description: Maximum memory Redis can use in MB.

variables.name: Eviction Policy
variables.description: What to do when max memory is reached. Options: allkeys-lru, volatile-lru, allkeys-lfu, noeviction
